product_updates.title: Microsoft, Google, Amazon say Anthropic Claude remains available to non-defense customers
product_updates.content: Trump's Department of War feud with Anthropic won't impact other companies that are using Claude via Microsoft and Google products.

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Claude found 22 vulnerabilities in Firefox over two weeks
product_updates.content: In a recent security partnership with Mozilla, Anthropic found 22 separate vulnerabilities in Firefox — 14 of them classified as "high-severity."

product_updates.title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
product_updates.content: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s $200 million contract fell apart, the DoD turn…

product_updates.title: Anthropic vs. the Pentagon, the SaaSpocalypse, and why competitions is good, actually
product_updates.content: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s $200 million contract fell apart, the DoD turn…

product_updates.title: Claude’s consumer growth surge continues after Pentagon deal debacle
product_updates.content: Claude's app is now seeing more new installs than ChatGPT and is growing its daily active users.

product_updates.title: City Detect, which uses AI to help cities stay safe and clean, raises $13M Series A
product_updates.content: City Detect, a company that helps local governments prevent urban decay, is in at least 17 cities so far, including Dallas and Miami.

product_updates.title: After Europe, WhatsApp will let rival AI companies offer chatbots in Brazil
product_updates.content: Meta is now allowing rival AI companies to provide their chatbots on WhatsApp to Brazilian users for a fee, a day after the company confirmed a similar decision for users in Europe.

product_updates.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
product_updates.content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most Anthropic customers are unaffected by the label.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Feds take notice of iOS vulnerabilities exploited under mysterious circumstances
technical_breakthroughs.content: The long, strange trip of a large assembly of advanced iOS exploits.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Is the Pentagon allowed to surveil Americans with AI?
technical_breakthroughs.content: The ongoing public feud between the Department of Defense and the AI company Anthropic has raised a deep and still unanswered question: Does the law actually allow the US government to conduct mass surveillance on Americans? Surprisingly, the answer is not straightforward. More than a decade afte…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: 10 things that matter in AI, plus Anthropic’s plan to sue the Pentagon
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
